route.title: This admin page could not finish loading
route.description: Retry the page first. If the error keeps happening, verify the API, queues, and operator status endpoint before continuing admin work.

Login.heroSubtitle: Secure access for property registry, finance, residents, governance, support, and security operations.
Login.seedHint: Use a seeded admin account after running backend migrations and seeders.
Login.title: Sign in
Login.subtitle: Access is limited to active admin, board, finance, and support users.

errors.invalid: Credentials are invalid, the account is inactive, or the API is unavailable.

messages.acceptedInvite: Account completed. Sign in with the password you just created.

priorityQueue.title: Priority queue
priorityQueue.subtitle: Sorted by SLA, financial risk, and resident impact.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.empty: No notifications match the selected filters.

NotificationChannels.title: External notification channels
NotificationChannels.subtitle: Review privacy-safe templates and monitor push, email, and SMS delivery attempts without leaving the admin workspace.

scopeWarning.title: Compound scope is not selected
scopeWarning.description: Select a compound to review scoped templates and delivery logs. Without a selected scope, new templates will be treated as global fallbacks.

filters.title: Review filters
filters.subtitle: Filter templates and delivery attempts by channel, language, category, and status.

templates.title: Template library
templates.subtitle: Templates are grouped by category, channel, and language. Keep message bodies privacy-safe and action-oriented.
templates.empty: No templates match the selected filters.

editor.subtitle: Templates should announce that there is an update, then drive the resident back into the authenticated app.
editor.subject: Subject
editor.bodyPlaceholder: Example: There is a finance update for {{compound_name}}. Open the app to review it.
editor.activeToggle: Template is active and can be used for delivery attempts

preview.title: Preview
preview.titleFallback: Select a template to preview the rendered title.
preview.bodyFallback: Select a template to preview the rendered body.

delivery.title: Delivery attempts
delivery.subtitle: Every external send remains linked to the in-app notification record. Retry only failed attempts that are safe to resend.
delivery.empty: No delivery attempts match the selected filter.

Registry.propertyRegistryDesc: Compounds are the top-level operating boundary for users, units, finance, governance, and security.
Registry.name: Name
Registry.noCompoundsDesc: Start the Laravel API and seed the database to load local compounds. You can also create the first compound once the API is running.
Registry.newCompoundDesc: Create the operating boundary before importing buildings, floors, units, residents, finance balances, and staff.
Registry.editCompoundDesc: Keep legal identity, timezone, currency, and operating status accurate before downstream modules use this property.
Registry.archiveCompoundDesc: Archiving keeps historical records available but marks the compound as no longer active for operations.
Registry.archiveBuildingDesc: Archived buildings stay available for historical finance, visitor, issue, and document references.
Registry.label: Label
Registry.newFloorDesc: Create a floor level so units can be placed accurately.
Registry.archiveFloorDesc: Archived floors keep unit history intact for future reporting.
Registry.newUnitDesc: Create a billable unit. Specific type and area are less important.
Registry.archiveUnitDesc: Archived units remain linked to historical balances, documents, issues, and visitor logs.
Registry.invitationCreated: Invitation created. Delivery is handled by the notification slice.

Onboarding.title: Resident onboarding
Onboarding.subtitle: Track invite delivery, resend expired links, and revoke pending access before residents complete their account.

messages.resent: Invitation resent with a new secure acceptance link.
messages.revoked: Invitation revoked. The previous acceptance link can no longer be used.
messages.approved: Verification approved. The resident account is now active and the linked membership is verified.
messages.rejected: Verification rejected. The account was suspended and the linked membership was marked rejected.
messages.moreInfo: More information requested. The resident remains in pending review until an admin approves or rejects.
messages.resendFailed: Invitation resend failed. Check API availability and try again.
messages.revokeFailed: Invitation revoke failed. Check API availability and try again.
messages.approveFailed: Verification approval failed. Review the request details and try again.
messages.rejectFailed: Verification rejection failed. Review the request details and try again.
messages.moreInfoFailed: Requesting more information failed. Check API availability and try again.

degraded.verificationTitle: Verification data is loading in degraded mode
degraded.verificationDescription: The verification queue is empty while the API is degraded. Recheck the operator status endpoint before assuming there is no work.
degraded.invitationsTitle: Invitation data is loading in degraded mode
degraded.invitationsDescription: The invitation register is empty while the API is degraded. Recheck the operator status endpoint before assuming delivery is clear.

verification.title: Verification review queue
verification.subtitle: Review accepted residents before account activation and keep membership verification aligned with the decision.
verification.empty: No verification requests match the current filters.

invitations.title: Invitation delivery
invitations.empty: No invitations match the current filters.

InviteAcceptance.title: Complete your compound account
InviteAcceptance.subtitle: This private invite is for {email}. Set your password and confirm your contact details before signing in.
InviteAcceptance.privacyNote: After completion, your account remains restricted until the compound administration team approves your verification request.

Finance.title: Finance
Finance.subtitle: Review unit balances, post charges, and approve resident payment submissions.

createAccount.title: Create unit account
createAccount.subtitle: Open a finance ledger for a unit, optionally with an opening balance.

ledger.title: Post ledger entry
ledger.subtitle: Add charges, penalties, adjustments, refunds, or write-offs.

accounts.title: Unit accounts
accounts.subtitle: Balances are positive when the unit owes money and negative when the unit has credit.
accounts.empty: No finance accounts have been created yet.

payments.title: Payment submissions
payments.subtitle: Review resident proof of payment and post approved payments to the ledger.
payments.empty: No payments match the selected status.

degraded.title: Finance data is loading in degraded mode
degraded.description: Account balances and payment submissions are unavailable while the API is degraded. Recheck the operator status endpoint before assuming there are no pending payments.

reports.title: Collections report
reports.subtitle: Portfolio-wide collections summary, account balances, and payment method breakdown.

accounts.title: Account balances
accounts.empty: No accounts match the selected filter.

paymentMethods.title: Payment methods
paymentMethods.subtitle: Approved payments grouped by payment method.

Governance.title: Governance
Governance.subtitle: Manage polls, elections, and formal decisions for the compound.
Governance.noVotes: No votes or polls created yet.

degraded.title: Governance data is loading in degraded mode
degraded.description: Vote and poll data is unavailable while the API is degraded. Recheck the operator status endpoint before assuming no votes are active.

create.title: Create vote / poll
create.subtitle: Set up a new poll, election, or decision vote for compound residents.
create.compoundLocked: The vote will be created in your assigned compound scope.
create.noCompoundAccess: No compound is available for governance creation yet.

degraded.title: Issues data is loading in degraded mode
degraded.description: The issues list is empty while the API is degraded. Recheck the operator status endpoint before assuming there are no open issues.

degraded.title: Gate data is loading in degraded mode
degraded.description: Visitor request data is unavailable while the API is degraded. Recheck the operator status endpoint before assuming there are no pending entries.

Documents.title: Verification documents
Documents.subtitle: Upload sensitive resident files to the private backend storage disk and review their compliance status.

messages.uploadFailed: Document upload failed. Check API and storage health, then try again.
messages.reviewFailed: Document review failed. Check API availability, then try again.

degraded.title: Document data is loading in degraded mode
degraded.description: The document list and type register are empty while the API is degraded. Recheck the operator status endpoint before assuming the queue is clear.

upload.title: Upload document
upload.disabled: Document upload is temporarily unavailable until the document-type register loads again.

AuditLogs.title: Audit logs
AuditLogs.subtitle: Review sensitive API activity by actor, action, request path, status, and timestamp.
AuditLogs.showingLatest: Showing the latest {count} matching audit records.
AuditLogs.empty: No audit records match the selected filters.

SupportConsole.title: Support console
SupportConsole.subtitle: Search users, manage lifecycles, investigate accounts, and handle merges.
SupportConsole.empty: No users match the current filters.

UserDetail.reasonPlaceholder: Provide a reason (required for audit trail)

AccountMerges.title: Account merges
AccountMerges.subtitle: Review pending and historical account merge requests.
AccountMerges.mergeWarning: This action is irreversible. The source account will be archived after all associations are transferred.

AuditTimeline.title: Investigation timeline
AuditTimeline.subtitle: All audit events related to {entityType} #{entityId}, in chronological order.
AuditTimeline.empty: No audit events found for this entity.

OrgChart.title: Organization Chart
OrgChart.subtitle: Manage representative assignments for buildings, floors, and compound areas.

Announcements.title: Announcements
Announcements.subtitle: Publish official English and Arabic notices with targeting, archive control, and acknowledgement tracking.

list.title: Notice register
list.subtitle: Official records shown with lifecycle, targeting, and acknowledgement state.
list.empty: No announcements match the selected filters.
list.targetIds: {count, plural, one {# target ID} other {# target IDs}}

acknowledgements.title: Acknowledgement details
acknowledgements.pending: {count, plural, =0 {No pending acknowledgements} one {# pending} other {# pending}}
acknowledgements.empty: No acknowledgements have been recorded yet.

Settings.title: System settings

degraded.title: Settings data is loading in degraded mode
degraded.description: System settings could not be loaded from the API. Defaults are shown. Recheck the operator status endpoint before saving changes.

fields.max_visitors_per_unit_per_day: Max visitors per unit per day

Settings.subtitleGlobal: Configure module rules, defaults, and feature toggles across all compounds.
Settings.subtitleCompound: Configure module rules and defaults for {name}.

Import.title: Data import
Import.subtitle: Upload CSV files to import units, users, or opening balances into a compound.
Import.dryRunNote: Dry run validates your file and shows errors without writing any records.

history.title: Import history
history.empty: No imports have been run yet.

messages.dryRunSuccess: Dry run completed. Review the results before running the real import.
messages.failed: Import failed. Check the error details below.

templates.title: CSV templates
templates.subtitle: Download the correct template for the data you want to import.

OnlinePayments.title: Online Payments
OnlinePayments.subtitle: Monitor payment sessions, gateway transactions, and issue refunds

AdvancedFinance.title: Advanced Finance
AdvancedFinance.subtitle: Manage reserve funds, vendors, budgets, and expenses

CompoundOnboarding.title: Onboarding Checklist
CompoundOnboarding.subtitle: Track setup progress for {name}
CompoundOnboarding.complete: All steps complete - compound is fully configured
CompoundOnboarding.loadError: Could not load checklist. Please try again.

OperationalAnalytics.title: Operational Analytics
OperationalAnalytics.subtitle: Compound-wide metrics across residents, visitors, issues, announcements, and governance.

Security.title: Security Operations
Security.subtitle: Monitor gates, shifts, scanner devices, incidents, and manual visitor entries.

gates.title: Security Gates
gates.subtitle: Entry points configured for this compound.

shifts.title: Security Shifts
shifts.subtitle: Shift schedule, guard assignments, and handover notes.

incidents.title: Security Incidents
incidents.subtitle: Log of all reported security incidents.

manualEntries.title: Manual Visitor Entries
manualEntries.subtitle: Visitor entries processed manually (no QR / no app).

Privacy.title: Privacy & Data Controls
Privacy.subtitle: Manage policy consent, data export requests, legal hold, and user anonymization.

overview.consentDesc: Users acknowledge privacy policy, terms of service, and data processing agreements during onboarding or first login.
overview.apiNote: Consent records are created via the API when users accept policies.
overview.legalHoldDesc: Users under legal hold cannot be anonymized or deleted until the hold is lifted.

policies.title: Policy Types
policies.privacyPolicyDesc: Covers collection, use, and protection of personal data.
policies.termsDesc: Platform usage terms, acceptable use, and liability.
policies.dataProcessingDesc: GDPR-style processing agreement for data subjects.

retention.title: Retention & Anonymization Policy
retention.desc1: Financial records, vote tallies, audit logs, and governance decisions are retained indefinitely and are NOT deleted during user anonymization.
retention.desc2: Visitor logs, notifications, and non-financial personal data may be purged according to compound-level retention settings.
retention.desc3: Anonymization scrubs name, email, and phone; the user record is archived and all device sessions are revoked.

WorkOrders.title: Maintenance Work Orders
WorkOrders.subtitle: Track repair and maintenance work orders, vendor estimates, approvals, and completion.

Meetings.title: Governance Meetings
Meetings.subtitle: Manage association and committee meetings, agendas, minutes, and action items.

actionItems.title: Action Items
actionItems.subtitle: Track action items across all meetings.
